summary: Re-validated BIBI Cars Single Car page flow after fixing two critical bugs: (1) React runtime error from Pydantic 422 detail arrays being rendered as React children, and (2) hard-coded 'Lucid Motors Air Pure' placeholders in Similar Cars block. All 9 required user stories PASS.
passed_tests: Story 1: No React crash on bad header VIN inputs - tested 7 invalid inputs (x, ab, test, 1N4AL, INVALIDVIN12345!, 12345678901234567, ../../etc), zero page errors, no React error overlay
Story 2: Invalid VIN URL doesn't crash - /cars/INVALIDXX renders proper 'VIN not found' state with human-readable string message (not serialized object), 'Browse catalog' button present
Story 3: Similar Cars are real & dynamic - 3 cards shown with different VINs (2016 Ford Fusion, 2013 Chevrolet Volt, 2013 Hyundai Santa Fe), mileage in km, no Lucid placeholders
Story 4: Similar Cars click navigation - clicked card navigated to /cars/3FA6P0SU1GR241913, H1 matched card title, different data from previous page
Story 5: Similar Cars pagination - found '01/04' pagination, clicked Next, cards changed to different set (2007 Toyota RAV4, 2016 Honda Pilot, 2019 Honda CR-V), pagination updated to '02/04'
Story 6: No Lucid hard-codes - tested 2 VIN pages (1N4AL3AP4FC574557, JTMK1RFV7ND089501), no 'Lucid Motors Air Pure' found anywhere, each page shows different real data
Story 7: Header search works - typed 'nissan', got 8 suggestions, clicked first, navigated to /cars/1N4AL3AP4FC574557 with proper data
Story 8: Welcome hero search works - typed full VIN '1N4AL3AP4FC574557', got suggestion, navigated correctly, H1 shows '2015 Nissan Altima'
Story 9: No unexpected console errors - only expected 401 auth errors, no React errors, no 500s
